title: Rescuers in Laos Scramble to Reach 7 People Trapped in Flooded Cave
summary_full: The group, which was searching for gold, has been trapped for almost a week. Divers who were involved in the 2018 rescue of a Thai youth soccer team have joined the operation.
summary_public: The group, which was searching for gold, has been trapped for almost a week. Divers who were involved in the 2018 rescue of a Thai youth soccer team have joined the operation.
